name: Carrot'n' Raisin Cheescake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine crumbs, granulated sugar, ground nutmeg, and melted margarine. Press mixture onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Bake at 325 degrees F., for 10 minutes.
3. In a separate bowl, combine cream cheese, granulated sugar, and flour. Mix until well blended.
4. Add eggs and orange juice to the cream cheese mixture. Blend in thoroughly.
5. Stir in remaining flour, shredded carrot, raisins, ground ginger, and orange juice. Mix until combined.
6. Pour batter over the crust in the springform pan.
7. Bake at 450 degrees F., for 10 minutes.
8. Reduce oven temperature to 250 degrees F. Continue baking for an additional 55 minutes.
9. Loosen cake from the rim of the pan and let cool before removing it.
10. Combine remaining cream cheese, orange juice, and powdered sugar. Mix until well blended.
11. Spread over the top of the cheesecake.
12. Garnish with additional raisins and finely shredded carrots, if desired.
